summary: Settled the current task lifecycle blocker, expanded source-lineage coverage to project and accepted factual records, added regression fixtures for unsupported project/accepted claims and anchor-only support, fixed verify:goal stdout buffering, and verified the legacy goal gate now passes 32/32.
decisions: Treat verify:goal 32/32 as legacy gate health, not final completion of the stricter ten-agent contract.
Reconstruct the missing blocked subagent trace as blocked, not successful, because the original task failed before finish_task.
Require source truth for factual 40_Projects and accepted 50_Instances records unless they are behavior/internal-session memory.
Classify user_supplied_anchor_summary records as source_anchor_unverified so they cannot count as factual support.
Allow accepted factual records to use verified durable source_paths such as verified Wiki/source artifacts as support.
next_steps: Implement dynamic live semantic query proof and hard gate.
Add review backlog and compounding lifecycle hard verifiers.
Strengthen behavior recall trigger zero-count completion checks.
Map the stricter ten-agent completion contract into verify:goal or a successor verifier.
search_queries: source lineage factual project accepted instance false green
